class.name: CrowdControlEffectParameter
class.brief_description: Defines configurable generic options for a [CrowdControlEffect].
class.description: [CrowdControlEffectParameter] allows effects to have options or dropdowns that viewers can fill out when triggering the effect. For example, selecting a specific color or target player.

method.name: to_json
method.description: Serializes this [CrowdControlEffectParameter] into a JSON-compatible dictionary for API transmission.
